True Detective director Cary Fukunaga will take next James Bond film.
According Variety, director Cary Fukunaga will direct next James Bond movie.
Also known Jane Eyre, Fukunaga will replace Danny Boyle latest director Bond film franchise.
Currently untitled, Fukunaga's Bond film will 25th film spy-action series.
film estimated release date November 2019.
Daniel Craig will return British hero whilst Whishaw, Naomie Harris Rory Kinnear will reprise their roles Moneypenny Tanner respectively.
Fukunaga best known directing first season True Detective Jane Eyre.
also produced mini series Maniac, African child soldier film Beasts Nation series Alienist.
Japanese American also known walking away from horror remake which became success Andy Muschietti.
